title: Secrets — Configure least-privilege access to Secrets
text:
To enhance the security measures around Secrets, use separate namespaces to isolate access to mounted secrets.

For guidelines to manage and improve the security of your Secrets, refer to
Good practices for Kubernetes Secrets
.
Learn how to
manage Secrets using
kubectl
Learn how to
manage Secrets using config file
Learn how to
manage Secrets using kustomize
Read the
API reference
for
Secret
